reviews.comment:
La Nafta es Nafta, pero a los que atienden ahí los tenes que rajar,. Les encanta Juntar Autos , tienen 4 islas y solo despachan de a dos. Pésimo

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline is gasoline, but the people who work there need to be fired. They love to line up cars; they have four pumps and only serve two at a time. Terrible.
